markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize terms and resolve technical blockers for the GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Phase 2 Term:** The 12-month commitment is non-negotiable, but quarterly payment terms were approved to address Elementum's CFO's concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Technical Blocker:** A pre-contract call is set for tomorrow (Jan 27, 9:30 AM PT) to validate GrowthX's ability to automate content publishing on Elementum's Vercel-hosted site.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Start Date:** Securing the Jan 9 Phase 1 start date requires contract finalization by Thursday, Jan 29, as only 2 slots are available for 4 companies.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Topics

### Phase 2 Annual Commitment

  - [**Elementum Request:** Quarterly commitment for the second term, driven by CFO pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**GrowthX Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
      - [The 12-month term is a standard requirement for all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [It's necessary to justify significant Phase 1 resource investment and build long-term domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
      - [GrowthX operates on a software-like model, not a flexible agency model.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Elementum accepted the 12-month term, satisfied by the approval of quarterly payment terms.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### Technical Integration & Automation

  - [**Problem:** Elementum's lean team requires fully automated content publishing to avoid manual involvement.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Context:** Elementum's site is AI-generated on Vercel, not a traditional CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Solution:** A pre-contract call was scheduled to confirm technical feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Participants:** Porter Hoskins (Elementum Engineer) & Ada (GrowthX Strategy Lead).](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
      - [**Goal:** Validate automation and define any required setup tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a critical prerequisite for finalizing the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Timeline & Contract Finalization

  - [**Phase 1 Start Date:**](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Target:** Jan 9 (requires contract by Jan 29).](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Backup:** Jan 16.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Contract Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [Andrew can redline the PandaDoc SOW directly via a provided link.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [Finalization is contingent on a successful technical validation call.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Add Porter Hoskins to the Jan 27, 9:30 AM PT technical call.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Confirm quarterly payment terms with the CFO.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [Redline the SOW in PandaDoc.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
      - [Host the technical validation call with Ada and Porter Hoskins.](https://fathom.video/share/DUUkV7b8e8zkbiETSzTD9Q-RXNzB-gaA?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
